This round corresponds to Experiment Round 08 final artifact consolidation.

## Notes

- This was artifact consolidation only.
- No large benchmark rerun was performed.
- No BER, full decoder, BCH algebraic decoder, or OFEC decoder was added.
- No local `paper/`, `references/`, or `external_refs/` content should be
  staged.
